name: FutuRe Europe Reinsurance
description: European reinsurance operations headquartered in Zurich

content.name: FutuRe Europe Reinsurance
content.description: European reinsurance operations covering treaty and facultative business across EMEA markets. Specializes in property catastrophe, casualty excess-of-loss, and specialty reinsurance lines. Headquartered in Zurich with underwriting offices in London, Paris, and Munich.
